description: Shankha asset bundle manifest. Drives the runtime loader at voice/components/ShankhaLottie.tsx. Each state declares which Lottie file the loader expects; missing files cause a graceful fallback to the inline SVG Shankha (voice/components/Shankha.tsx). See README.md for the full designer specification.

idle.behavior: Static conch with subtle 4s breath loop on the warm-glow opacity (±5%)

listening.behavior: Slow steady pulse at the mouth, 1.6s cycle, gold rim brightens 70%→70%

thinking.behavior: Inward shimmer sweep top→bottom, 2.4s cycle, no external pulse

interrupted.behavior: Wave-fade-out 300ms, conch dims 15%, then transition target = listening

offline.behavior: Cool moonlit ivory tint, 6s ambient drift, near-stillness

error.behavior: Dimmed 80%, slight cool gray cast, no animation

speaking.behavior: RN-rendered sound waves driven by ExoPlayer RMS metering via Reanimated 3 worklets. Conch underneath stays static. DO NOT produce a Lottie for this state — it cannot sync to real audio.

crisis.behavior: Steady warm light, no animation, grounding by stillness. DO NOT produce a Lottie — the static SVG render handles this state.

adaptive_icon_foreground.spec: 432×432px, Shankha centered in 108×108dp safe zone, transparent margins

notification_icon.spec: 96×96px, pure-white silhouette on transparent, single layer
